consumer.notes:
ci: trigger firmware publish on per-variant tags

Replace the release-published trigger with push tags ['consumer-v*']. The variant and version are derived from the tag (consumer-v0.9.0 -> -target consumer -version v0.9.0), the manifest notes come from the annotated tag message, and the job publishes ${type}.wpb plus the variant's manifest entry. Firmware variants version independently on their own tag lines; this does not use a repo-wide version. Add referee-v*/pro-v* when those mkimage targets exist.
